name: massaman stuffed poblanos
notes:
Original recipe from priya krishna. tagged indian (not thai) because massaman curry paste — despite being a 'yellow thai curry paste' — is essentially indian in its spice profile (cumin, coriander, cardamom, cinnamon, cloves). it's the most indian thing in the thai curry shelf.

AUGMENT THE PASTE: if your massaman curry paste is light on indian spices (some commercial pastes lean more thai-aromatic than indian-spice), augment with turmeric, cumin, and coriander to push the indian profile forward.

DAIRY: cream cheese binds the filling, milk loosens it. heavy whipping cream is a richer alternative — keeps it as a secondary option.
